title: Beacon Bounding Box
description: Client-side mod to visualize beacon's effect range.
body:
# Beacon Bounding Box
*Take the guesswork out of beacon coverage.*

**Beacon Bounding Box** is a lightweight utility mod that visually displays the area of effect of every beacon in the world using colorful bounding boxes. Each beacon is given a randomly assigned color, making it easy to distinguish between multiple beacons. Even when their ranges overlap.

## Key Features
- **Visual range display**: See each beacon’s area of effect as a 3D bounding box.
- **Random colors**: Every beacon gets a unique, randomly generated color.
- **Toggle support**: Easily toggle the bounding box rendering on or off via a keybind (default **G**).
- **Conduit support**: Now also renders a **sphere** to show the area of effect of conduits! Default toggle key is **H**.
- **Configurable height**: Customize the vertical size of the beacon box in-game using **Mod Menu** and **Cloth Config**, or the **JSON** file in `config/beaconrange.json`.

- **NEW! Beacon Extender Compat**: Added Compatibility for Beacon Extender in Mod Version 1.1 (Only for Minecraft 1.21.4)
- **NEW! Box Mode**: Added Box Mode, you can switch between Outlines and Boxes in Config. Added in Mod Version 1.2

Whether you're building a mega base, organizing effects, or just want a better visual reference, **Beacon Bounding Box** helps you manage beacon and conduit coverage with clarity.

## Planned Features:
- Make the opacity of box mode's walls configurable.
- Box mode shader support (unlikely).
- Ability to place a "ghost beacon" to test how far it's range expands before even placing the beacon itself.
